response.text:

rationale: r3c5 is 0.20 below threshold (SoC 0.05), meets urgent criteria, and micro-sharing 0.5 kWh aligns with cascading-failure prevention while preserving my 0.25 SoC floor.

user:

Your current policy: sharing_intent=balanced, share_min_soc_frac=0.25, distrusted_peers=[].
Your latest belief: Three peers at 10% SoC are in cascading failure risk; micro-sharing (0.3–0.5 kWh per tick) to geographic neighbors is necessary to prevent neighborhood collapse while I maintain 25% SoC floor for 4-hour survival..
